slots.root: flex gap-3 items-start px-4 py-3.5 rounded-md border-[length:var(--bw)]
slots.title: font-body font-semibold text-ctl text-base-content
slots.action: mt-2.5 bg-transparent border-none p-0 cursor-pointer font-mono text-ctl-sm font-bold tracking-uppercase-status uppercase
slots.close: inline-flex items-center bg-transparent border-none cursor-pointer text-base-content/62 text-[length:var(--icon-md)] leading-ctl
